scripts.dev: concurrently -n srv,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: node_modules/.bin/esbuild api-src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=api/index.js --target=node20 && npm run build -w client
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
